title: Customs and Excise (Electronic Machinery and Equipment) (Suspension) Regulations, 2021

sections.heading: (1) These Regulations may be cited as the Customs and Title
sections.text:
(1) These Regulations may be cited as the Customs and Title
Excise (Electronic Machinery and Equipment) (Suspension) commence-
ment
Regulations, 2021.
(2) These Regulations shall come into operation on 1st
January, 2022.

sections.heading: The customs duty on the goods set out in the Schedule is Suspension
sections.text:
The customs duty on the goods set out in the Schedule is Suspension
suspended to free. of customs
duty on
electrical
machinery
and
equipment

sections.heading: The Customs and Excise (Electrical Machinery and Revocation
sections.text:
The Customs and Excise (Electrical Machinery and Revocation
Equipment) (Suspension) Regulations, 2008 are revoked. of S.I. No.
32 of 2008
Copies of this Statutory Instrument can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K4.00 each.
770 Statutory Instruments 31st December, 2021
